title: WhalePosition
description: A single whale position snapshot from Hyperliquid. All monetary values in USD unless noted. Missing or unavailable fields MUST be null, never 0 or empty string.

label.description: Human-readable label for the address. null if unknown.

account_value_usd.description: Total account value in USD. null if unavailable. Unit: USD.

coin.description: Asset symbol, e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL, HYPE. Uppercase.

direction.description: Position direction. MUST be long or short. NEVER buy/sell.

signed_size.description: Signed position size in coin units. Positive = long, negative = short.

absolute_size.description: Absolute position size in coin units. Always >= 0.

position_value_usd.description: Total position value in USD. Unit: USD.

entry_price.description: Average entry price in USD. Unit: USD.

mark_price.description: Current mark price in USD. Unit: USD.

unrealized_pnl_usd.description: Unrealized profit/loss in USD. Positive = profit, negative = loss. Unit: USD.

liquidation_price.description: Liquidation price in USD. null if unavailable or not applicable. Unit: USD.

liquidation_distance_pct.description: Percentage distance from mark price to liquidation price. Negative = closer to liquidation. Example: -8.5 means 8.5% away from liquidation. null if unavailable.

funding_rate_pct.description: Current funding rate as percentage for this position. null if unavailable.

snapshot_time_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this position snapshot was taken. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ.

data_source.description: Data source identifier. Example: hyperliquid_info_public, fixture, degraded.

source_health.description: Health status of the data source at snapshot time.

allOf.description: When liquidation_price is present, liquidation_distance_pct SHOULD also be computed. When liquidation_price is null, liquidation_distance_pct MUST be null.
